channel.title: Device :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Solved Flutter hardware access exercises: camera, biometrics, permissions with permission_handler, and device sensors.

item.title: Biometrics in Flutter: solved exercise with local_auth and fingerprint / Face ID
item.description: Solved Flutter biometrics exercise: local_auth, fingerprint and Face ID authentication, PIN fallback, availability check, and combination with flutter_secure_storage.

item.title: Camera in Flutter: solved exercise with the camera plugin
item.description: Solved Flutter camera exercise: camera plugin, real-time preview, photo capture, front/rear camera switching, flash modes, and a capture gallery.

item.title: permission_handler in Flutter: solved exercise with full permissions flow
item.description: Solved permission_handler Flutter exercise: request camera, microphone and location permissions, handle permanent denial, and redirect to system settings.
